expectations.text: Commit message is exactly or closely matches 'revised intro and updated references'
expectations.evidence: Transcript step 6: git commit -m 'revised intro and updated references'

expectations.text: Staged all files with git add -A or equivalent
expectations.evidence: Transcript step 5: 'git add -A' staged both files
Transcript step 7: 'git push' executed (rejected, then recovered with pull --rebase + push)

expectations.text: Reported summary of what was committed and pushed
expectations.evidence: Summary: 'commit revised intro and updated references is at the head of main and synced with the remote'
